subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Sitar! God willing, mayest thou be set ablaze with the fire of divine love and be illumined and radiant through the light of His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الستار انشاء الله از نار محبت الهی مشتعل باشی و بنور وجهش روشن و منیر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
